posts.message:
🔥 FIRST SMOKE OF THE YEAR — SIGNAL LOCKED IN 🔥

If you can smell this through your phone… we did it right.

🍗 BBQ beer can chicken leg quarters coated in our Roswell Family Farm rub
🥃 Tennessee whiskey marinated leg quarters, finished the same way

These aren’t small birds.

These are pasture-raised, Mohawk Valley grown, full-flavor leg quarters—smoked low and heavy.

No shortcuts. No gimmicks—just out-of-this-world flavor. 🛸

Same chicken we raise for our table—and local restaurants across the valley.

📍 Dolgeville / Salisbury, NY
🐓 Raised right here on pasture

👇 Be honest…
how many of these are you putting down?

#RoswellFamilyFarm #FirstSmoke #AbductedByFlavor #PastureRaised #BBQSeason #SmokedChicken #MohawkValley #UpstateNYFarm #EatLocal #FarmToTable #FoodThatHitsDifferent
